1.description: Chat conductor for a new service request (runbook Playbook 3). Drives the whole guided flow end to end: searches the catalog, lets the user pick an item, fetches and collects its intake form, confirms, then submits and starts fulfilment. This is the UC-8 chat entry point; it sequences the catalog operations and handles its own confirmation before any create. Action-tier but self-approving (confirmation happens in-flow before submit).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: What the user wants to request (free text); defaults to the latest user message.
